summary: PASS for current sprint MVP-02-remove-cohort-domain-001 only. The fixer closed DOC-SYNC-001: current AGENTS.md, README.md and docs/setup/codex-setup.md no longer expose cohort/wave or the old cohort admin env var as current MVP/setup wording. Active backend/API/admin code, final V005 migration behavior, tests, OpenAPI/generated-client no-op, admin screenshots and sensitive-data guardrails are proven for this scoped refactor. The harness still fails only on status.json latest_verified_sprint_contract_id alias sync, which this verifier intentionally did not edit. This verdict does not close full MVP-02, the MVP stage or any human gate.
proven_scope: Active production/admin/test code scan has no cohort/wave/COHORT matches in apps/api src, apps/admin, apps/web or packages.

No hidden /cohorts or cohortId public/admin MVP route remains in scoped active code; the admin status route is /api/v1/admin/tenants/{tenantId}/pilot-launches/{pilotLaunchId}/access-pools/{accessPoolId}/code-status.
Canonical/setup docs scan has no cohort/wave/COHORT/current env-var hits after the fixer, including AGENTS.md, README.md and docs/setup/codex-setup.md.
Append-only V005 creates pilot_launches/access_pools, backfills old rows, moves invite_codes and employee_registrations to access_pool/pilot_launch references and drops old cohort columns/table.
Historical V002/V004 cohort refs are immutable migration history; V005 cohort refs are transition backfill/drop detail with no runtime exposure.
Focused tests cover 500-code access-pool issuance, one-time activation, idempotent same-subject retry, duplicate/expired/invalid paths, employee registration and privacy-safe admin code-status rows.
Employee registration response returns tenantId, pilotLaunchId and accessPoolId, not cohortId.
Admin UI renders access-pool Russian copy and refreshed screenshots exist for success, mobile success, empty, error and loading states.
OpenAPI source/tests match the new contract and assert the old /cohorts path/cohortId are absent.
packages/api-client still contains only .gitkeep, so generated-client update is a valid explicit no-op for this sprint.
Sensitive-data guardrails hold for this scope: admin status DTO/UI fixture do not expose raw invite codes, lookup hashes, activation subject refs or employee contact fields.
not_closed: MVP-02.04 human gates beyond existing DONE_WITH_HUMAN_PENDING technical decision
financial correctness, rewards, fulfillment, HR wording and production content approval

acceptance_criteria.detail: Active production API/backend/admin code scan has no cohort/wave/COHORT matches.
V005 is append-only and drops active cohort table/columns after backfill; V002/V004 remain historical immutable migrations.
Invite issuance/activation tests cover 500-code access-pool capacity, one-time activation, idempotent retry and duplicate/expired/invalid rejection.
Employee registration still accepts name/email/phone/code and returns pilotLaunchId/accessPoolId.
Admin status/funnel view is read-only, privacy-safe and uses access-pool path/DTO/Russian UI copy.
OpenAPI source/tests match the new contract; packages/api-client has no generator/artifacts beyond .gitkeep.
Docs-sync gap from prior FAIL is fixed: current canonical/setup docs scan has no cohort/wave/current old-env-var hits.
Remaining cohort/wave matches are limited to historical migrations, V005 transition backfill/drop detail, prior immutable stage history or current cleanup contract text.
Human gates remain open/non-DONE in status/evidence; this verifier did not close them.
Full MVP-02 and MVP stage remain open; this verdict is scoped only to MVP-02-remove-cohort-domain-001.

checks.detail: Harness fails only because status.json.latest_verified_sprint_contract_id remains MVP-02-04-closure-audit-001 while current sprint aliases point to MVP-02-remove-cohort-domain-001. Per verifier scope, status.json was read but not edited.
Post-verdict harness result is unchanged: only status.json.latest_verified_sprint_contract_id remains on the previous verified sprint.

remaining_term_classification.detail: V002 and V004 retain old schema text as immutable migration history.
V005 mentions old table/columns only to backfill and drop them; final statements drop old columns/indexes/constraints/table.
Current sprint/task/evidence text names the removed term by design; prior task/verdict/evidence/raw refs preserve pre-refactor history.

human_gates.gate: admin auth/role/audit policy for production use
financial correctness, rewards, fulfillment, HR wording and production content approval outside this refactor

environment_notes: Root make commands were run with JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home and PATH prefixed with /opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin.
status.json remains intentionally unsynced for latest_verified_sprint_contract_id because verifier scope is read-only for status/stage closure artifacts.
dirty_worktree_notes: The worktree was already dirty before this verifier started and includes prior builder/fixer production, docs and stage changes.
This verifier wrote only allowed verification artifacts under .agent/stages/mvp/: raw outputs, verdict aliases and problems artifacts.
Production code, canonical docs and status.json were read but not edited.
scope_statement: This verdict covers only MVP-02-remove-cohort-domain-001. It does not close full MVP-02, the MVP stage or any human gate.
